narrative:
Massillon City has 19,833 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.9 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +0.0% D−R vs +8.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
